title: Min and Max Campaign Spending
description: Write a query to find the minimum and maximum Campaign_Spending from book2. Alias the columns as Min_Spending and Max_Spending.

schema: CREATE TABLE book2 (sno INTEGER, Party_Name TEXT, Contact_Name TEXT, Address TEXT, Campaign_Spending INTEGER)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT MIN(Campaign_Spending) AS Min_Spending, MAX(Campaign_Spending) AS Max_Spending FROM book2

schema: CREATE TABLE book2 (sno INTEGER, Party_Name TEXT, Contact_Name TEXT, Address TEXT, Campaign_Spending INTEGER)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT MIN(Campaign_Spending) AS Min_Spending, MAX(Campaign_Spending) AS Max_Spending FROM book2
